---
name: 🛠️ Engineering Task
about: Technical debt, refactoring, or infrastructure maintenance.
title: "[TASK]: "
labels: maintenance, tech-debt
assignees: ''

---

**Task Description**
A clear description of the technical work to be performed.

**Technical Requirements**
- [ ] List specific files to be modified (e.g., `src/ingestion/file-ingestion.js`)
- [ ] List required test updates (e.g., `test/pipeline.test.js`)

**Impact**
How does this affect the Ingest -> Analyze -> Report loop?

**Definition of Done**
- [ ] Unit tests passing
- [ ] `npm run docs:generate` updated
- [ ] Documentation reflects architectural changes
